top_signals.title: EM Long Bonds Seen Missing Out on Any Iran Peace Dividend
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market bond investors expecting a broad rally from any US-Iran peace deal may be in for a disappointment, as money managers see sticky inflation and fiscal concerns keeping long-term yields elevated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Rep Steube Discusses Concerns Over Acting DNI Head
top_signals.summary: President Trump has appointed Bill Pulte as the Acting Director of National Intelligence which has mixed reactions from lawmakers on both sides of the aisle. Republican Congressman Greg Steube joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his opinion on Pulte's appointment. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
